intent: Procedural placeholder WAVs express cue length, envelope, pitch register, and mix hierarchy. Replace with final authored brass/steam layers after integration.
import_notes: Import as mono, decompress on load for short UI/gameplay cues under 1s unless final audio policy differs.
Looping disabled for all cues in this staging pack.
Route, pickup, objective, and menu cues belong on UI/SFX bus; impact/death can be world or hybrid bus depending on source.

cues.intent: short brass ping plus softened metal tick; -13 LUFS short cue target
cues.mix: high-mid transient, below weapon fire, sidechain ducked by gunshot bus

cues.intent: soft ratchet click with body-material layer hook
valve drop, low metal clonk, steam release tail
cues.mix: one-shot emphasis, protected from crowd hit spam for 0.25s

cues.intent: positive valve tick, soft gauge rise, tiny steam inhale
cues.mix: front UI bus, duck ambience by 1 dB for 0.12s

cues.intent: warm three-note chime through brass resonator, no jump scare
cues.mix: music-compatible, never masks enemy threat callouts

cues.intent: paper/plate stamp plus quiet gauge tick
cues.mix: UI bus with narrow transient; avoid competing with pickup confirm

cues.intent: dry clack + blocked steam chirp; short, non-punishing
cues.mix: low volume but sharp attack; throttle repeat to 0.35s

cues.intent: valve opens, soft pressure rise, two light ticks
cues.mix: spatialized if world-sourced, UI layer if compass-sourced

cues.intent: soft mechanical focus ticks, no looping hiss under settings
cues.mix: UI ticks -18 LUFS, respect menu SFX slider

cues.intent: muffled pressure thump at restrained cadence
cues.mix: heartbeat-style cue capped and disabled in pause/settings

cues.intent: hollow cartridge rattle, last-round click accent
cues.mix: weapon-adjacent, less urgent than health, no constant loop
